title: stipa zalesskyi var. iljinii
intro: Stipa zalesskyi var. iljinii, also known as Zalessky's fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zalessky's fescue include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of allergies and colds. Zalessky's fescue can be prepared into various herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
